# Godot 4.x generated files
.import/
.godot/

# Godot editor-specific files
.godot/editor/
.godot/imported/
.godot/mono/
.godot/shader_cache/

# Project cache/configs that should not be versioned
.godot/*_cache*
.godot/*.cfg
.godot/*.md5

# OS-specific junk
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Art assets
ArtAssets/
